LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF RICHARD COHEN'S MOTION FOR LEAVE TO FILE 2ND AMENDED COMPLAINT IS OFF CALENDAR. THE PROOF OF SERVICE STATES THAT THE MOTION WAS SERVED BY FEDEX ON DECEMBER 27, 2013. THE LAST DAY FOR TIMELY SERVICE WAS DECEMBER 25, 2013. (SEE CCP SEC. 1005(B), "'IF THE NOTICE IS SERVED BY FACSIMILE TRANSMISSION, EXPRESS MAIL, OR ANOTHER METHOD OF DELIVERY PROVIDING FOR OVER-NIGHT DELIVERY, THE REQUIRED 16-DAY PERIOD OF NOTICE BEFORE THE HEARING SHALL BE INCREASED BY TWO CALENDAR DAYS.") Defendants Notice Of Motion And Motion To Dismiss Or Stay
Off Calendar Aug-07-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling.
DEFENDANTS BGC HOLDINGS, L.P.'S and BGC PARTNERS, INC.'S Motion To Dismiss Or Stay is Off calendar at the request of the moving party. Judge: Marla J. Miller; Clerk: Cynthia Herbert; Reporter: Ann Delgado, CSR # 11185, Tel. No. (951)764-4047 =(302/MJM)

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE
Off Calendar Jul-10-2014 Continued To Sep-24-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar May-23-2014 Set For Order To Show Cause On Jul-15-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-02-2014 Continued To Jun-11-14 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

MOTION FOR LEAVE TO File Second Amended Complt
Off Calendar Mar-03-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:

No appearance.

RULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling which was uncontested. PLAINTIFF RICHARD COHEN's Motion For Leave To File Second Amended Complaint is granted. No opposition was filed and the parties stipulated to the requested relief. The Court signed the order that was sent by email to the court. Judge: Peter Busch; Clerk: Gina Gonzales; Reporter: Maria Viscio, CSR# 12353.

Ntc Of Mtn And Mtn For Leave To File [Proposed] 2nd Amd Complt
Off Calendar Jan-22-2014 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: No appearance on this matter. rULING: The Court adopted its tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF RICHARD COHEN's motion For Leave To File 2nd amended complaint is off calendar. The proof of service states that the motion was served by FedEx on December 27, 2013. The last day for timely service was December 25, 2013. (See CCP sec. 1005(b), "'if the notice is served by facsimile transmission, express mail, or another method of delivery providing for over-night delivery, the required 16-day period of notice before the hearing shall be increased by two calendar days.") Judge: Ernest Goldsmith, Clerk: Lesley Fiscella, Not reported.
